data.title: [test-sprint-epic-selection-display]: pre-existing tests grep instruction-file body text -> Rule 5 violations
data.description:
## Incident Overview
The test file tests/skills/test-sprint-epic-selection-display.sh contains multiple tests that grep plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md body text for specific prose/tokens. Per behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5, grep-based content assertions on non-executable instruction files are prohibited (change-detector pattern). These tests pre-date the behavioral testing standard and should be migrated to structural boundary tests or integration tests.

## Actual Behavior
Pre-existing tests like test_phase_1_renders_numbered_list, test_hidden_epics_note, etc. grep for specific content tokens in SKILL.md prose.
